title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mumbai University Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mumbai University Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mumbai University Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mumbai University Global Group:
Mumbai University Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University Global Group!
